transcript_events.text: The scrollbar for the Supervisor tab in the toolbar for the web surface is on the wrong element; it should be on the .chat-output-box. Create a refine goal for this.
Sent 1 queued message to the provider.

I’ll create one narrowly scoped Refine goal for moving the Supervisor tab’s scrolling boundary to `.chat-output-box`, with browser verification in the acceptance criteria. I’ll first confirm the local goal-creation interface and current state so I don’t bypass supervision or duplicate an existing goal.

No existing goal matches this scrollbar ownership bug. I found related Supervisor UI goals, but they cover tab structure, input behavior, lifecycle controls, and status—not which element owns scrolling—so this is a distinct goal. I’m recording the implementation boundary and browser-level acceptance evidence without starting or promoting the goal.
